findings.problem: The governed tasks template does not make checkpoint tasks carry or clearly reference the minimal verification bundle, required `index_context` fields, routing target, and caller-local runtime guardrails required by the shared schema contract.
findings.evidence: `openspec/schemas/ai-enforced-workflow/schema.yaml:361`-`370` requires each checkpoint task to name those items in the task body or in a clearly referenced shared verification contract block. `openspec/schemas/ai-enforced-workflow/templates/tasks.md:1`-`33` provides only a Repository Index Plan block, and `openspec/schemas/ai-enforced-workflow/templates/tasks.md:39` defines the checkpoint scaffold without those fields and without a reference to a shared verification contract block. The change-local pattern in `openspec/changes/introduce-index-aware-verifier-workflow/tasks.md:61`-`110` shows the missing shared contract block that the template should scaffold.
findings.recommendation: Add a shared governed verification contract block to `openspec/schemas/ai-enforced-workflow/templates/tasks.md`, or update the checkpoint scaffold to explicitly reference such a block and include the minimal bundle fields, required `index_context` fields, routing target, and caller-local runtime guardrails.
